name: LoadedModules
summary: The LoadedModules collector shows the loaded modules of running processes.

fields.name: process_name
fields.description: The name of the running process.

fields.name: process_imagepath
fields.description: Path to the process's image name.

fields.name: module_imagepath
fields.description: Path to the module's image name.

fields.name: module_reputation
fields.description: The module's reputation name and level (range) defined by TIE or ATP . Known Trusted — [99,100] — This is a trusted file. Most Likely Trusted — [71,85] — Almost certainly a trusted file. Might Be Trusted — [51,70] — Appears to be a benign file. Unknown — [31,50] — Cannot make a determination at this time. Might Be Malicious — [16,30] — Appears to be a suspicious file. Most Likely Malicious — [14,15] — Almost certainly a malicious file. Known Malicious — 1 — This is a malicious file. Not Set — 0 — No reputation has been specified.

fields.name: module_sha1
fields.description: The SHA-1 hash code for the module.

fields.name: module_sha2
fields.description: The SHA-256 hash code for the module.

fields.name: module_md5
fields.description: The MD5 hash code for the module.

examples.title: Example: Show names of modules with process ID of 71, running on host "osx-elcapitan-01".
examples.v2_query: LoadedModules where HostInfo hostname equals "osx-elcapitan-01" and LoadedModules id equals 71
